title: CARD Credential
description: Credential for Agent Runtime Decisions (CARD) — the trust credential that agents carry in the Agent Trust Layer. A CARD-Carrying Agent has verified identity, consent architecture, and audit capability.

agent_id.description: Globally unique agent identifier. URN format: urn:uuid:<v4>

card_type.description: Yellow Shield = Consent Before Delivery (CBD). Green Shield = Consent Before Execution (CBE). Green is strictly stronger than Yellow.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 expiration. Null = no expiration (must be re-verified periodically).

id.description: Issuer identifier. For Opn.li Trust Network: https://ve-staging.opn.li

trust_surface.description: SHA-256 certification surface hash of the agent's declared tool catalog. Changes to the catalog invalidate the CARD.

tools_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the sorted, serialized tool catalog.

tool_count.description: Number of tools in the certified catalog.

mode.description: cbd = Consent Before Delivery. cbe = Consent Before Execution.

timeout_ms.description: Consent timeout in milliseconds. 0 = no timeout. On timeout: fail-closed (deny).

fail_closed.description: ATL invariant: consent failure always denies. This field is always true.

delegation_vrcs.description: Hook for Decentralized Trust Governance (DTG) integration. When present, links this CARD to a Verifiable Relationship Credential (VRC) pair: one VRC from the agent operator to the ATL (granting consent-gate authority), one from the ATL to the platform (asserting CARD-Ready status). See: FPP White Paper, DTGWG.

operator_to_atl.description: VRC from the agent operator granting consent-gate authority to the ATL.

atl_to_platform.description: VRC from the ATL asserting CARD-Ready status to the receiving platform.

audit.description: Audit trail metadata. The full audit log is maintained separately (see @opnli/atl-devkit audit-logger).

log_format.description: JSON Lines with SHA-256 hash chain. Tamper-evident, not tamper-proof (INV-16).

genesis_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the genesis audit log entry.
